Synthetic SDS Fixture: Corrosive Cleaner B
Supplier: Synthetic Fixture Laboratory
Revision: 2026-05-06

Section 2 - Hazard Identification
Causes severe skin burns and eye damage. May be corrosive to metals.

Section 4 - First Aid Measures
If on skin, take off contaminated clothing immediately and rinse skin with
water for at least 15 minutes. If eye contact occurs, rinse cautiously with
water for several minutes and seek medical attention.

Section 7 - Handling and Storage
Do not breathe mist or spray. Store locked up in corrosion-resistant containers.
Keep only in the original container.

Section 8 - Exposure Controls and Personal Protection
Wear chemical-resistant gloves. Wear face shield or tightly fitting safety
goggles. Use local exhaust ventilation where mist may form.
